Q: What specific part of Jerusalem will be reported as struck by an explosion seconds after missile sirens on March 20, 2026?
BG: Question Start Date: 2026-03-12. During periods of regional conflict, missile alerts can trigger emergency responses and breaking news reports in Israel. This question asks which named place in Jerusalem would be identified if an explosion is reported after such an alert.

### 757234 | res=2026-03-19 | string (organization)
Q: Which organization will be reported as rescuing a toddler from rubble after an airstrike by 29 March 2026?

Q: What bank will French authorities say was targeted in a foiled explosive attack at its Paris headquarters in March 2026?

Q: Which country will Sri Lanka publicly identify, by March 2026, as having asked to land two combat aircraft at Mattala airport?
BG: Question Start Date: 2026-02-23. Mattala airport is a civilian airport in southern Sri Lanka. Foreign governments can request permission to use Sri Lankan airports, and Sri Lanka’s government can approve or deny such access.

### 668257 | res=2026-03-19 | string (name)
Q: Who will be reported as the IRGC spokesman whose funeral is held in Iran by March 2026?
